title: Reservations are open for XREAL AURA — plus, see more news from AWE 2026.
summary: Reservations are now open for XREAL AURA, XREAL's first tethered XR glasses built with Google for Android XR.
content: Reservations are now open for XREAL AURA, XREAL's first tethered XR glasses built with Google for Android XR.
